title: Wall Street rises with semiconductor rebound; Nasdaq leads gains
summary: Wall Street closed higher on Tuesday, boosted by a recovery in semiconductor stocks and the strong performance of big tech, with the Nasdaq rising more than 1%.

title: London Stock Exchange plans to operate 24 hours a day starting next year
summary: The London Stock Exchange plans to implement a nearly 24-hour continuous trading system to attract more investors, according to reports from several international media outlets.

title: Bitcoin rises 1.75% and Ethereum advances amid risk appetite
summary: Cryptocurrencies recorded gains on Tuesday, with Bitcoin and Ethereum rising, in a context of higher investor confidence and a return of risk appetite.

title: German DAX surpasses 25,000 points driven by semiconductors
summary: The German index closed higher on Tuesday above 25,000 points, benefiting from the strong performance of semiconductor and technology stocks.

title: Micron Technology surges 13% and ranks among the biggest S&P 500 gainers
summary: The chipmaker rose sharply on Tuesday, backed by bullish technical signals, and ranked among the most profitable stocks on the S&P 500 index.

title: Nebius Group jumps 15% on Nasdaq as its chairman sells shares
summary: The tech company's stock was the biggest gainer on the Nasdaq on Tuesday, while it was reported that its chairman sold shares worth $1.4 million.

title: Ibex 35 closes higher and recovers 19,300 points supported by banks
summary: The Spanish index rose on Tuesday and recovered the 19,300-point level, supported by the banking sector and with stocks like CaixaBank breaking through technical resistances.
